description: Discussion on recent developments in the Solana ecosystem, including the announcement of a new hackathon called Riptide and the introduction of Solana Pay, a new payments protocol. The conversation emphasizes community engagement and the integration of developers and validators within the Solana network.
topic_summary: The Solana community discusses the Riptide hackathon and the Solana Pay protocol, highlighting opportunities for collaboration among developers and validators [t=54:00].
